title: Request access icon is no longer available
excerpt: The little lock icon on boards that allowed me to request access to connecter boards no longer exist. It means that i can no longer have access to a connected column that have been connected to a board that i do not have…

posts.author: Combier_C (Combier_C)
posts.cookedHtml:
The little lock icon on boards that allowed me to request access to connecter boards no longer exist. It means that i can no longer have access to a connected column that have been connected to a board that i do not have access…

There is no way to know the name of this board, and no way to ask for access.
Is this a new “Feature” ?

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there! This option has been moved to a new area on the board. You can now access it by clicking on the name of the board and then clicking on the “Limited” section under the permissions line:

Screenshot 2024-07-18 at 10.23.58 AM992×712 50.6 KB

Please do let me know if there’s anything else I can help with

posts.author: Combier_C (Combier_C)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you so much!
I had difficulty finding the answer through Monday’s support.
